name: io.github.mkibrick/compshop
title: CompShop
description: Independent directory of 350+ compensation surveys. Search, filter, and recommend salary-survey publishers (Mercer, WTW, Aon Radford, Pearl Meyer, SullivanCotter, Gallagher, Empsight, Culpepper, Croner, PAS, and more) by industry, region, or job title. Read-only, no auth required.
